description_long: This is a tall, rectangular floor-standing control cabinet, commonly used in urban environments for housing electrical or network equipment. The front features a rack-mounted configuration with multiple electronic devices, indicator lights, and a pull-out keyboard tray with a monitor, suggesting it is used for server or network management. The sides and back are solid, smooth panels with a dark finish and a blue OVH.COM logo, providing a secure enclosure for the internal components. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely steel, for durability and security, with some plastic and glass elements for the monitor and keyboard. There are no visible ventilation grilles or external handles, and the cabinet is designed to be accessed from the front. The overall appearance is sleek and professional, suitable for placement in data centers, utility rooms, or protected outdoor urban locations.
description: A tall, dark metal control cabinet with a rack-mounted server setup, front access panel, and OVH.COM branding. Features a pull-out keyboard tray and monitor for equipment management.
description_view_0: Side view showing a solid, dark panel with the OVH.COM logo and a protruding keyboard tray.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rack-mounted electronic equipment, indicator lights, monitor, and pull-out keyboard tray.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the OVH.COM logo and visible keyboard tray.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, solid dark panel with no visible features or openings.
